title: encyclia bidentata
intro: Encyclia bidentata, also known as the two-toothed Encyclia, is a species of orchid found in Central and South America, characterized by its two-toothed labellum and white, yellow, or orange flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Encyclia bidentata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Encyclia bidentata can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infused oil, often used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
